paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.32, representing a decrease of 3.95 percent from the prior close and a decrease of 20.9 percent over the last 21 sessions. There have been 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours. Recent news includes an article from NewsChannel 10 on MSN about Project Matador, a 17-gigawatt private power and AI campus being built by Pantex, and an article from PR Newswire about Fermi Inc.'s admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights.

There are 25 total filings in the feed, including 1 Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings. Recent filings include an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and a response letter from Everson, as well as an 8-K form disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031.
There have been 2 new social posts in the last 24 hours, including a discussion thread about Fermi America and a post about Google raising its FY26 CapEx guide.
